injuries.comment: Walman will not be in action versus Minnesota on Tuesday (Dec. 2), per Jason Gregor of Sports 1440 Edmonton reports.
The Oilers said on Friday (Nov. 28) that Roslovic will be out for a couple of weeks.
Yurov will not be in the lineup versus Edmonton on Tuesday (Dec. 2) but is considered day-to-day with an undisclosed injury and will travel with the team, per Michael Russo of The Athletic reports.
